steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The subject is 'her painting' (singular). The adverb 'Currently' signals present tense. The verb must be singular and present.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'hung': simple past; contradicts 'Currently.' ✗
  • Choice B — 'hangs': singular present tense; agrees with 'her painting' and matches 'Currently.' ✓
  • Choice C — 'was hanging': past progressive; contradicts 'Currently.' ✗
  • Choice D — 'will have hung': future perfect; contradicts 'Currently.' ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
